info.title: Clous API
info.description: Entity-resolved, agent-native SEC filings API. Public data from SEC EDGAR; Clous is independent of the SEC.

get.description: Liveness + ClickHouse reachability.

schema.title: Response List Advisers V1 Advisers Get
Response Get Adviser V1 Advisers  Crd  Get

get.summary: Plan + remaining credits for the calling key
get.description:
How many credits are left on this key. Free with no debit. When metering
is disabled the API is ungated, so credits read as 'unlimited'.

schema.title: Response Get Account V1 Account Get

get.description:
Public coverage catalog: every live dataset, its record count, and when it
was last refreshed. Powers the Coverage/Freshness page; no key required.

schema.title: Response List Sources V1 Sources Get

get.summary: Full-text search across SEC filing bodies (2001+)
get.description:
Full-text search over the body of every EDGAR filing since 2001, proxied
live from SEC EDGAR's full-text index and wrapped in the Clous envelope.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Keyword or "exact phrase" to search filing full text.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Keyword or "exact phrase" to search filing full text.

parameters.name: forms

schema.description: Comma-separated form types to restrict to, e.g. 8-K,10-K.
schema.title: Forms

parameters.description: Comma-separated form types to restrict to, e.g. 8-K,10-K.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination offset cursor from a prior page.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Pagination offset cursor from a prior page.

schema.title: Response Full Text Search V1 Full Text Get

get.description:
Resolve an accession (via our filing index) and return the filing's
document manifest from EDGAR — every file + its type, size, and direct URL.

schema.title: Response Get Filing Documents V1 Filings  Accession  Documents Get

get.summary: Structured XBRL company facts (all reported concepts)
get.description:
Structured financial facts for a company, proxied from SEC's XBRL frames
(data.sec.gov). Returns reported values per concept with units and periods —
the building blocks of income statement / balance sheet / cash flow.

parameters.name: concept

schema.description: Filter to one XBRL concept, e.g. us-gaap:Revenues.
schema.title: Concept

parameters.description: Filter to one XBRL concept, e.g. us-gaap:Revenues.

schema.title: Response Get Company Facts V1 Financials  Cik  Get

get.summary: Extract a named item from a filing (10-K/10-Q/8-K)
get.description:
Fetch a filing's primary document and return the text of a named item.
Best-effort section extraction (item header → next item header); covers the
common 10-K/10-Q/8-K items. For raw documents use /documents.

parameters.name: item

schema.description: Item to extract, e.g. "1A" (Risk Factors), "7" (MD&A), "5.02" (8-K leadership).
schema.title: Item

parameters.description: Item to extract, e.g. "1A" (Risk Factors), "7" (MD&A), "5.02" (8-K leadership).

schema.title: Response Extract Filing Item V1 Filings  Accession  Extract Get

get.summary: Insider transactions from a Form 3/4/5 ownership filing
get.description:
Parse a Section 16 ownership filing (Form 3/4/5) into structured insider
transactions: who, their relationship to the issuer, and every derivative /
non-derivative trade with shares, price, and resulting holdings.

schema.title: Response Get Insider Transactions V1 Filings  Accession  Insiders Get

get.summary: Classify the reported items in an 8-K filing
get.description:
Detect which numbered items an 8-K reports (e.g. 5.02 leadership change,
4.01 auditor change, 2.02 earnings) and return each with its canonical title
and a short text excerpt — the structured 'what happened' of a current report.

schema.title: Response Get 8K Events V1 Filings  Accession  Events Get

get.description:
Extract the list of subsidiaries a registrant disclosed in Exhibit 21 of
its annual report. Best-effort: returns the parsed name/jurisdiction rows plus
the raw exhibit text so the full disclosure is always available.

schema.title: Response Get Subsidiaries V1 Filings  Accession  Subsidiaries Get

get.description:
Curated feed of SEC 8-K **Item 1.05 — Material Cybersecurity Incident**
disclosures. Since Dec 2023, registrants must file within four business days of
determining a cyber incident is material. Sourced live from EDGAR's full-text
index and filtered to filings that actually report Item 1.05 (not merely mention
it), so voluntary Item 8.01 cyber notes are excluded.

parameters.name: date_from

schema.description: Earliest filed date, YYYY-MM-DD (rules took effect Dec 2023).
schema.title: Date From

parameters.description: Earliest filed date, YYYY-MM-DD (rules took effect Dec 2023).

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination cursor from a prior page.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a prior page.

schema.title: Response Get Cyber Incidents V1 Cyber Incidents Get

get.description:
Parse a Reg CF **Form C** offering statement into structured data: the
issuer, the offering terms (amount, price, security, deadline), and the
most-recent / prior-fiscal-year financial disclosures.

schema.title: Response Get Crowdfunding V1 Filings  Accession  Crowdfunding Get

get.description:
Parse an **N-PX** fund proxy-voting filing into structured vote records:
per meeting, the issuer/CUSIP, the matter voted on, shares voted, how the
fund voted, and management's recommendation. Vote tables are large, so this
is cursor-paginated.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination cursor from a prior page.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a prior page.

schema.title: Response Get Proxy Votes V1 Filings  Accession  Proxy Votes Get

parameters.name: fund_type

schema.description: Investment fund type substring, e.g. Venture Capital
schema.title: Fund Type

parameters.description: Investment fund type substring, e.g. Venture Capital

schema.title: Response List Raises V1 Raises Get
Response List Managers V1 Managers Get

parameters.name: manager

schema.description: Substring over the filing manager name, e.g. Berkshire
schema.title: Manager

parameters.description: Substring over the filing manager name, e.g. Berkshire

parameters.name: cusip

schema.description: Filter to holders of a CUSIP
schema.title: Cusip

parameters.description: Filter to holders of a CUSIP

schema.title: Response List Holdings V1 Holdings Get

get.summary: Stream of normalized SEC business-change events
get.description:
Lift the rule-based score (materiality/direction) and any briefing out of the
event's `details` JSONB onto the event itself, so agents read them as first-class
fields without digging into details.

schema.title: Response  Promote Event V1 Events Get

get.summary: A single event with full evidence

schema.title: Response Get Event V1 Events  Event Id  Get
Response List Webhook Endpoints V1 Webhooks Endpoints Get
Response Create Webhook Endpoint V1 Webhooks Endpoints Post
Response List Webhook Deliveries V1 Webhooks Deliveries Get
Response List Monitors V1 Monitors Get
Response Create Monitor V1 Monitors Post
Response Get Monitor V1 Monitors  Monitor Id  Get
Response Update Monitor V1 Monitors  Monitor Id  Patch
Response Delete Monitor V1 Monitors  Monitor Id  Delete

get.summary: AI briefing of a filing — materiality, direction, and a plain-English read
get.description:
Materiality (1-3) + direction for any filing, plus — when a model is
configured — a grounded summary / what-it-means / what-to-watch synthesized
from the filing text. The score is rule-based (free, deterministic); the AI
fields are best-effort and null when unavailable.

schema.title: Response Get Briefing V1 Filings  Accession  Briefing Get

post.summary: Grounded, cited answer over SEC filings
post.description:
Ask a question; get an answer synthesized strictly from SEC filing text, with
citations to the source filings and a basis (confidence + reasoning). Scope with
`accession` (one filing), `cik`/`ticker` (an entity), or leave open (full corpus).
Pass `output_schema` (JSON Schema) to get a structured answer.

post.summary: OpenAI-compatible chat completions over SEC data
post.description:
Drop-in OpenAI Chat Completions: point any OpenAI client at
base_url=https://api.clous.ai/v1 with model="clous". The last user message is
answered, grounded in SEC filings; citations + basis ride along under `clous`.

schema.title: Response Chat Completions V1 Chat Completions Post

post.summary: Append the latest EDGAR filings into the warehouse (admin)
post.description:
Pull EDGAR's newest filings and append any not already present to the
warehouse tables (sec_filings, insider_txns, …). Keeps /v1/filings, /v1/insider,
etc. as fresh as SEC. Idempotent; safe to call frequently or on demand.

schema.title: Response Admin Refresh V1 Admin Refresh Post

get.description: Filters: cik (str), form_type (str), q (str), accession (str), filed_from (str), filed_to (str), sic (str), state_of_incorp (str), is_xbrl (bool). Cursor pagination; agent-native envelope; 5 credits/call.

Filters: issuer_cik (str), owner_cik (str), ticker (str), issuer (str), owner (str), trans_code (str), acquired_disposed (str), derivative (bool), date_from (str), date_to (str), min_value_usd (int). Cursor pagination; agent-native envelope; 5 credits/call.

Filters: cik_filer (str), cik_subject (str), issuer (str), person (str), role (str), form_type (str), form_class (str), filed_from (str), filed_to (str). Cursor pagination; agent-native envelope; 5 credits/call.

Filters: registrant_cik (str), series_id (str), accession_number (str), cusip (str), isin (str), security (str), fund_name (str), asset_category (str), inv_country (str), report_date (str), report_date_from (str), report_date_to (str), filed_date_from (str), filed_date_to (str), min_value_usd (int), restricted_only (bool). Cursor pagination; agent-native envelope; 5 credits/call.

Filters: cik (str), accession_number (str), issuer (str), name (str), title (str), is_independent (bool), min_age (int). Cursor pagination; agent-native envelope; 5 credits/call.

signals.title: Signals
signals.description: Event types to match; empty = all for the target.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary key/values echoed into the webhook payload (e.g. routing).

output_schema.title: Output Schema
output_schema.description: JSON Schema to reshape the matched event in the webhook payload.

trigger_on_create.title: Trigger On Create
trigger_on_create.description: Evaluate against recent events immediately on creation.
